response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role is a Director-level IC Principal Engineer requiring ~15 years of experience plus recognized AI expertise and strategic influence. Resume shows roughly 13-15 years of hands-on development with minimal AI/ML depth, no demonstrated AI products or platforms, no evidence of advising strategic customers, and no track record of director-level technical leadership or cloud/AI strategy work.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded and infra
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of community contribution: talks, workshops, open-source platform (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, products, or platforms at the scale this role requires
Lacks Principal/Director-level IC scope — no evidence of org-wide technical strategy or advising strategic customers
Cloud experience is limited (some AWS CDK); no deep cloud-platform architecture leadership
